3105410.name: CleanUp!
3105410.description:
Here comes the stylish garbage game!

A true trash game where you become a janitor and throw out trash!

This game is a single player trash action game that lets you experience being a janitor and throwing away trash.
You can throw away anything you can grab.
Throw the trash into the illuminated trash cans in the city!
You can master garbage collection in Score Attack mode or enjoy leisurely garbage collection in Free Mode.

Can you throw away all the trash?

Playing time
10 minutes~.

Operation Method
ASDW Move
Left Click Grab Trash
Right click Throw the grabbed trash
Esc Retire

Options
From Options, you can configure graphic settings, mouse sensitivity, and other settings.
